response.justification: The candidate shows well over the required 6 years of full-stack experience with sustained TypeScript/Node.js product work, recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development, and demonstrated cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker). A long record of testing-focused practice (TDD, authoring test frameworks, teaching testing courses) aligns strongly with the role's quality emphasis. Gaps are stack-specific rather than fundamental: no Nest.js or Kotlin exposure is evident, and frontend depth leans toward Ember.js more than React.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js product and AI-agent/MCP infrastructure work
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, built test frameworks and runners, taught testing workshops
Cloud and infrastructure experience: AWS CDK, Kubernetes deployments, Docker, CI/CD setup
concerns: No demonstrated Nest.js experience, a core framework in the primary stack
No Kotlin and only limited Java exposure for the secondary backend services
React experience appears thin relative to Ember.js; Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly evidenced

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js/Kotlin and limited React depth
